headline: Amazon Is Reportedly Using A Secretly Disturbing Tactic To Get Rid Of Unwanted Employees
summary: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) is reportedly adopting a subtle strategy to reduce its workforce.

headline: Apple Preps 'Most Sophisticated Sales Pitch Ever' For Vision Pro Debut On Feb. 2 With Demo Lasting 25 Minutes, Says Gurman, While Highlighting One Key Issue
summary: Apple is leaving no stone unturned when it comes to the Feb. 2 debut of its Vision Pro headset, says Bloomberg columnist Mark Gurman.

headline: Tesla Earnings Around The Corner: As Stock Struggles, Analyst Highlights 3 Numbers That Matter
summary: Tesla has been fundamentally challenged due to both economic and industry-specific issues. This has weighed down on the stock.

headline: MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor Netted $20 Million In Sell-Off Prior To Bitcoin ETF Launch
